sql:
/* 
====================================================================
Title: March 2026 User Point Collection & Redemption Breakdown
Description: 
Calculates the number of users who only collected points vs. users 
who both collected and redeemed points during March 2026.
====================================================================
*/
with ua as (
    select 
        distinct user_id::bigint as uid,
        value::jsonb ->> '1' as customer_type
    from user_answers
)
, dl as (
    select
        distinct user_id::bigint as uid,
        count(*) as total_lucky_draws
    from draw_lots
    where created_at >= '2025-12-01 00:00:00'
      and created_at <= '2025-12-31 23:59:59'
    group by uid
)
, collect_points as (
    select 
        point_id::bigint as cpid,
        sum(point) as collect_points
    from transaction_points tp
    where pointable_type = 'Activity'
      and tp.created_at >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
      and tp.created_at <= '2026-03-31 23:59:59'
    group by cpid
)
, redeem as (
    select 
        point_id::bigint as rid,
        sum(abs(point)) as redeem_points
    from transaction_points tp
    where pointable_type = 'Reward'
      and pointable_id != 9
      and tp.created_at >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
      and tp.created_at <= '2026-03-31 23:59:59'
    group by rid
)
, p as (
    select 
        id::bigint,
        user_id::bigint as uid,
        point as balance
    from points
)
, final as (
    select 
        p.uid,
        ua.customer_type,
        p.balance,
        cp.collect_points,
        r.redeem_points,
        dl.total_lucky_draws
    from collect_points cp
    join p on cp.cpid = p.id
    left join redeem r on p.id = r.rid
    left join ua on ua.uid = p.uid
    left join dl on ua.uid = dl.uid
)

select 
    count(distinct uid) filter (where collect_points >= 1 and redeem_points is null) as user_only_collect,
    count(distinct uid) filter (where collect_points >= 1 and redeem_points is not null) as user_collect_and_redeem,
    sum(redeem_points) as total_redeem_points,
    sum(total_lucky_draws) as grand_total_draws
from final;
